returns.label: 🎵 Preview (คลิก แยก Stems ได้เลย)

type.title: FileData
type.additional_description:
The FileData class is a subclass of the GradioModel class that represents a file object within a Gradio interface. It is used to store file data and metadata when a file is uploaded.

Attributes:
    path: The server file path where the file is stored.
    url: The normalized server URL pointing to the file.
    size: The size of the file in bytes.
    orig_name: The original filename before upload.
    mime_type: The MIME type of the file.
    is_stream: Indicates whether the file is a stream.
    meta: Additional metadata used internally (should not be changed).

returns.label: เลือกไฟล์เพลง (MP3 / WAV / FLAC / M4A)

type.title: FileData
type.additional_description:
The FileData class is a subclass of the GradioModel class that represents a file object within a Gradio interface. It is used to store file data and metadata when a file is uploaded.

Attributes:

code_snippets.python:
from gradio_client import Client

client = Client("http://localhost:7860")
result = client.predict(
	url="Hello!!",
	api_name="/_yt_download",
)
print(result)
code_snippets.bash:
curl -X POST http://localhost:7860/gradio_api/call/v2/_yt_download -s -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"url": "Hello!!"}' \
  | awk -F'"' '{ print $4}' \
  | read EVENT_ID; curl -N http://localhost:7860/gradio_api/call/_yt_download/$EVENT_ID

code_snippets.python:
from gradio_client import Client, handle_file

client = Client("http://localhost:7860")
result = client.predict(
	audio_file=handle_file('https://github.com/gradio-app/gradio/raw/main/test/test_files/audio_sample.wav'),
	api_name="/separate_stems",
)
print(result)
code_snippets.bash:
FILE_PATH=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:7860/gradio_api/upload -F 'files=@/path/to/your/file' | tr -d '[]" ')

curl -X POST http://localhost:7860/gradio_api/call/v2/separate_stems -s -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"audio_file": {"path": "'$FILE_PATH'", "meta": {"_type": "gradio.FileData"}}}' \
  | awk -F'"' '{ print $4}' \
  | read EVENT_ID; curl -N http://localhost:7860/gradio_api/call/separate_stems/$EVENT_ID

The FileData class is a subclass of the GradioModel class that represents a file object within a Gradio interface. It is used to store file data and metadata when a file is uploaded.

code_snippets.python:
from gradio_client import Client

client = Client("http://localhost:7860")
result = client.predict(
	v_on=False,
	d_on=True,
	b_on=True,
	g_on=True,
	p_on=True,
	o_on=True,
	v_vol=100,
	d_vol=100,
	b_vol=100,
	g_vol=100,
	p_vol=100,
	o_vol=100,
	pitch=0,
	api_name="/mix_stems",
)
print(result)
code_snippets.bash:
curl -X POST http://localhost:7860/gradio_api/call/v2/mix_stems -s -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"v_on": false, "d_on": true, "b_on": true, "g_on": true, "p_on": true, "o_on": true, "v_vol": 100, "d_vol": 100, "b_vol": 100, "g_vol": 100, "p_vol": 100, "o_vol": 100, "pitch": 0}' \
  | awk -F'"' '{ print $4}' \
  | read EVENT_ID; curl -N http://localhost:7860/gradio_api/call/mix_stems/$EVENT_ID
code_snippets.cli:
{command} predict http://localhost:7860 /mix_stems '{
  "v_on": true,
  "d_on": true,
  "b_on": true,
  "g_on": true,
  "p_on": true,
  "o_on": true,
  "v_vol": 100,
  "d_vol": 100,
  "b_vol": 100,
  "g_vol": 100,
  "p_vol": 100,
  "o_vol": 100,
  "pitch": -12
}'

type.title: FileData
type.additional_description:
The FileData class is a subclass of the GradioModel class that represents a file object within a Gradio interface. It is used to store file data and metadata when a file is uploaded.

Attributes:
    path: The server file path where the file is stored.
    url: The normalized server URL pointing to the file.
    size: The size of the file in bytes.
    orig_name: The original filename before upload.
    mime_type: The MIME type of the file.
    is_stream: Indicates whether the file is a stream.

code_snippets.python:
from gradio_client import Client, handle_file

client = Client("http://localhost:7860")
result = client.predict(
	audio_file=handle_file('https://github.com/gradio-app/gradio/raw/main/test/test_files/audio_sample.wav'),
	genre="Lo-fi",
	api_name="/apply_genre_transform",
)
print(result)
code_snippets.bash:
FILE_PATH=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:7860/gradio_api/upload -F 'files=@/path/to/your/file' | tr -d '[]" ')

curl -X POST http://localhost:7860/gradio_api/call/v2/apply_genre_transform -s -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"audio_file": {"path": "'$FILE_PATH'", "meta": {"_type": "gradio.FileData"}}, "genre": "Lo-fi"}' \
  | awk -F'"' '{ print $4}' \
  | read EVENT_ID; curl -N http://localhost:7860/gradio_api/call/apply_genre_transform/$EVENT_ID

parameters.label: 🎵 เลือก Stem (ต้องแยก stems ก่อน)

python_type.type: Literal['🎹 Acoustic Grand Piano', '🎹 Electric Piano 1', '🎸 Acoustic Guitar (nylon)', '🎸 Acoustic Guitar (steel)', '🎸 Electric Guitar (clean)', '🎸 Overdrive Guitar', '🎻 Violin', '🎻 Viola', '🎻 Cello', '🎻 String Ensemble', '🎹 Choir Aahs', '🎺 Trumpet', '🪗 Trombone', '🪗 Tuba', '🎺 French Horn', '🪈 Soprano Sax', '🪈 Alto Sax', '🪈 Tenor Sax', '🪈 Oboe', '🪈 Clarinet', '🪈 Flute', '🎹 Synth Strings', '🎹 Pad: Warm']

type.title: FileData
type.additional_description:
The FileData class is a subclass of the GradioModel class that represents a file object within a Gradio interface. It is used to store file data and metadata when a file is uploaded.

Attributes:
    path: The server file path where the file is stored.
    url: The normalized server URL pointing to the file.
    size: The size of the file in bytes.
    orig_name: The original filename before upload.
    mime_type: The MIME type of the file.
    is_stream: Indicates whether the file is a stream.
    meta: Additional metadata used internally (should not be changed).

code_snippets.python:
from gradio_client import Client

client = Client("http://localhost:7860")
result = client.predict(
	stem_choice="vocals",
	instrument_name="🎻 Violin",
	soundfont_path="/usr/share/sounds/sf2/FluidR3_GM.sf2",
	mix_volume=80,
	api_name="/render_orchestra",
)
print(result)
code_snippets.bash:
curl -X POST http://localhost:7860/gradio_api/call/v2/render_orchestra -s -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"stem_choice": "vocals", "instrument_name": "🎻 Violin", "soundfont_path": "/usr/share/sounds/sf2/FluidR3_GM.sf2", "mix_volume": 80}' \
  | awk -F'"' '{ print $4}' \
  | read EVENT_ID; curl -N http://localhost:7860/gradio_api/call/render_orchestra/$EVENT_ID
